summary: Comprehensive testing of cohort learning app completed. Backend APIs working excellently (20/20 tests passed after health endpoint fix). Frontend UI functional with minor chatbot overlay issue.

minor_issues.issue: Health endpoint was missing (fixed during testing)
minor_issues.impact: Minor - health check endpoint now returns 200

ui_bugs.issue: Chatbot FAB button blocked by 'Made with Emergent' overlay badge
ui_bugs.details: Overlay element intercepts pointer events preventing chatbot button clicks

passed_tests: Admin project management (create, list, detail, recommendations)
Admin case study management (create, list, detail, messages)
Login page renders with Google sign-in button
Member dashboard renders with correct stats and notifications
Navigation between pages (Directory, Discussions, Projects, Case Studies)
Admin dashboard renders with management interface
Admin case study button present and functional
Navbar shows correct links for member vs admin users
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chatbot widget overlay issue - the 'Made with Emergent' badge is blocking the chatbot FAB button clicks. Consider adjusting z-index or positioning to prevent pointer event interception.
